verses.text: أَلَمۡ تَرَ كَيۡفَ فَعَلَ رَبُّكَ بِأَصۡحَٰبِ ٱلۡفِيلِ
verses.translation: Have you not considered, [O Muhammad], how your Lord dealt with the companions of the elephant
verses.translation_pt: Você não viu o que Deus fez com os donos do elefante?

verses.translation: Did He not make their plan into misguidance
verses.translation_pt: Deus não frustrou o plano deles?

verses.translation: And He sent against them birds in flocks
verses.translation_pt: E Deus enviou contra eles aves em bandos.

verses.translation: Striking them with stones of hard clay
verses.translation_pt: Atiravam neles pedras de argila queimada.

verses.translation: And He made them like eaten straw
verses.translation_pt: Deus os fez como palha comida.
